compiled_state.title: UI designer reference injection: visual and structural design guidance from reference library
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
Follow-on epic stub — needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation (scrutiny:pending).

## Context
The ui-designer agent generates wireframes and design artifacts without access to the structured corpus of USWDS component patterns, design principles, color guidance, and anti-patterns established by epic 0b7c-d811. This epic integrates ref-query.sh into ui-designer, querying at Summary + Detail tier for visual and structural guidance relevant to the component and domain being designed.

## Success Criteria
- ui-designer queries .claude/scripts/dso ref-query for entries matching the component type and domain being designed
- USWDS component patterns, design principles, and relevant anti-patterns are injected before wireframe generation
- Injection scoped to domain + component dimensions; does not load full corpus
- Design artifacts reference applicable corpus entries in their metadata

## Dependencies
- Epic 0b7c-d811 (ref-query.sh retrieval contract) must be complete before this epic can be implemented
